email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Migration Specialist bij ACENSI. Uw oproep voor een hands-on professional met oog voor detail en ervaring met CMS sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met WordPress (Elementor, Astra) en voer ik contentmigraties uit voor klantwebsites. Ik structureer en formatteer content volgens templates, zorg voor correcte metadata en tagging, en bewaak de kwaliteit en consistentie. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) geïmplementeerd en technische SEO/GEO-audits uitgevoerd, wat mijn oog voor detail en gestructureerd werken versterkt.

Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en Nederlands op B1-niveau (met actieve lessen). Ik ben beschikbaar om grotendeels on-site in Brussel te werken en kan snel schakelen tussen taken. Uw vraag naar een pragmatische, communicatieve medewerker past bij mij.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Content Migration Specialist position at ACENSI. Your call for a hands-on professional with attention to detail and CMS experience aligns perfectly with my profile.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with WordPress (Elementor, Astra) and perform content migrations for client websites. I structure and format content according to templates, ensure correct metadata and tagging, and monitor quality and consistency. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and conducted technical SEO/GEO audits, which strengthened my eye for detail and structured working.

I speak English and Turkish fluently, and Dutch at B1 level (with active lessons). I am available to work mostly on-site in Brussels and can switch between tasks quickly. Your need for a pragmatic, communicative team member fits me.

I attach my CV and motivation letter. I hope to convince you further in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Met veel interesse solliciteer ik naar de functie van Content Migration Specialist bij ACENSI. Uw omschrijving van een hands-on professional die content migreert, structureert en kwaliteit bewaakt, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met contentmanagement in WordPress. Ik migreer content van oude naar nieuwe websites, formatteer deze volgens de gewenste templates en zorg voor correcte metadata en tagging. Ik werk nauw samen met het team om deadlines te halen en signaleer proactief risico's. Mijn oog voor detail en gestructureerde aanpak zorgen voor consistente en foutloze content.

Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com uitgebreide ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en technische SEO/GEO-audits. Dit heeft mijn vermogen om content te organiseren en te optimaliseren voor zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines versterkt. Ik ben gewend om met verschillende stakeholders te communiceren en snel te schakelen tussen taken.

U vraagt om een goede kennis van Nederlands en/of Frans en Engels. Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en Nederlands op B1-niveau. Ik volg actief Nederlandse lessen om mijn taalvaardigheid verder te verbeteren. Daarnaast ben ik beschikbaar om grotendeels on-site in Brussel te werken.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de combinatie van contentmigratie, kwaliteitscontrole en samenwerking met diverse teams. Ik ben pragmatisch, leergierig en werk graag gestructureerd. Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn technische achtergrond en contentervaring een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan een soepele website-lancering.

Ik hoop u in een persoonlijk gesprek verder te overtuigen van mijn motivatie en kwaliteiten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

I am very interested in applying for the Content Migration Specialist position at ACENSI. Your description of a hands-on professional who migrates content, structures it, and monitors quality aligns perfectly with my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with content management in WordPress. I migrate content from old to new websites, format it according to the required templates, and ensure correct metadata and tagging. I collaborate closely with the team to meet deadlines and proactively flag risks. My attention to detail and structured approach ensure consistent and error-free content.

Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I gained extensive experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits. This has strengthened my ability to organize and optimize content for both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am used to communicating with various stakeholders and switching between tasks quickly.

You require a good knowledge of Dutch and/or French and English. I speak English and Turkish fluently, and Dutch at B1 level. I am actively taking Dutch lessons to further improve my language skills. Moreover, I am available to work mostly on-site in Brussels.

What appeals to me in this role is the combination of content migration, quality control, and collaboration with diverse teams. I am pragmatic, eager to learn, and enjoy working in a structured manner. I am confident that with my technical background and content experience, I can make a valuable contribution to a smooth website launch.

I hope to convince you further of my motivation and qualities in a personal interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on content migration and CMS experience: daily use of WordPress (Elementor, Astra) for migrating, structuring, and formatting content with correct metadata and tagging.
• Strong attention to detail and quality: implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and ran technical SEO/GEO audits on mirook.com, ensuring consistency and completeness.
• Organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks: coordinate content delivery plans, meet deadlines, and proactively identify risks in current role at Episto.
• Good communication and stakeholder collaboration: work closely with digital communication team and business stakeholders; fluent in English and Turkish, Dutch B1.
• Affinity with digital communication and web content: SEO blog writing, content management, and performance tracking using analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs).
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content migration, CMS management, and web content structuring. At Episto, I migrate and implement content into WordPress, ensuring correct formatting, metadata, and tagging. On my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data and technical audits to improve content quality and consistency. Comfortable working with stakeholders, managing multiple tasks, and meeting deadlines. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: content migration, website content management, editorial content publishing, SEO blog & content writing, WordPress site building (Elementor, Astra)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Migrate and implement content into WordPress websites, structuring and formatting according to templates
- Ensure correct use of metadata, tagging, and page structure for client sites
- Write keyword-targeted blog content to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions
- Coordinate with team to meet content delivery deadlines and proactively identify risks

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) with full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
